name: Mince-Meat Cookies
recipeInstructions:
1. Cream the shortening and sugar until smooth.
2. Add the eggs, one at a time, beating well after each addition.
3. Sift together the flour, baking powder, and salt.
4. Gradually add the sifted ingredients to the creamed mixture.
5. Mix thoroughly until all ingredients are combined.
6. Chill the dough for 2 hours in the refrigerator.
7. Turn the chilled dough onto a lightly floured surface.
8. Roll out the dough to a thickness of 1/8 inch (or about 3 mm).
9. Cut into desired shapes using a floured cookie cutter.
10. Prepare the filling by combining mincemeat, sugar, and water in a saucepan over medium heat until heated through for approximately 10 minutes.
11. Allow the filling to cool completely.
12. Place a teaspoon of filling between two cookies.
13. Press the edges together to seal.
14. Bake on a preheated hot oven set to 425°F (220°C) for 10 minutes, or until golden brown.
36 servings.
